name: @rozie-ui/popover
comment:exports: vendorable: true (D-01 / P72). A vendorable primitive exposes its canonical .rozie source (+ the branchy internal/middleware helper) under STABLE subpaths so the D-07 <components> specifier `@rozie-ui/popover/Popover.rozie` (and `@rozie-ui/popover/internal/middleware`) resolves via ProducerResolver (enhanced-resolve, exportsFields:['exports']) for every NON-codegen consumer — the VR harness, the IDE LSP, and any consumer that compiles the composite from raw source (data-table's header menu, 72-02). Mirrors the combobox exports precedent. Codegen itself remaps the specifier to the local vendored sibling in-memory before compile.

scripts.typecheck: echo 'no TS sources (the .rozie is codegen-compiled; leaves typecheck the emitted output)'
